topic: Bitcoin miners face a new rival for cheap power as Anthropic signs multi-gigawatt compute deal
hook: The power struggle just got a new contender.

scenes.text: Bitcoin miners ran the numbers on cheap power. They found a permanent advantage. Then they found a new line on the bill.
scenes.visual: A single-column ledger page, a pen circles 'electricity cost'. A second column labeled 'AI' appears.

scenes.text: Anthropic just signed for multi-gigawatt compute. A new industrial-scale appetite. The grid now has two high-stakes bidders.
scenes.visual: A stark power substation at dawn, two arrows labeled 'BTC' and 'AI' converge on a transformer.

scenes.text: Miners optimized for stranded energy. A clever arbitrage. Now they're competing with a client who just needs the electrons, raw.
scenes.visual: Aerial shot of a remote hydro dam. A Bitcoin mine on one bank, a data center shell under construction on the other.

scenes.text: The audit is simple. Price per watt determines the survivor. One turns energy into a ledger. The other turns it into a story.
scenes.visual: A split screen: left, scrolling blockchain hashes; right, streaming AI-generated video. Both fade to a single, glowing power meter.

caption.tiktok: When AI needs power at scale, everyone recalculates.
caption.ig_reels: When AI needs power at scale, everyone recalculates.
caption.yt_shorts: When AI needs power at scale, everyone recalculates.
